examination_log.notes: CORRECTION: Stress test BLEU scores from H0-STREPS exam may be unreliable for non-English-source models. The stress test pipeline used English fallback input for models whose source language lacked a curated paragraph, producing an artificial 85.7 BLEU score artifact on ~51% of models. For Tier C models, the dedicated retest with correct source language input supersedes the original stress test scores.
